THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASEY, DAVID THOMAS COURTNEY, SHEILAGH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 151 LEXINGTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,280.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,280.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-18-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVE BACK RENT IF DEFTS VACATE ON OR BEFORE 5PM ON 9-17-96. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEFTS TO LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PLTF WILL S/A JUDGMNT & DISMISS W/OUT PREJ IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES.
